tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All laboratory values are within normal limits except for a low HDL cholesterol (29.2 mg/dL), which may increase cardiovascular risk. Glycemic, renal, and electrolyte parameters are stable. Lipid profile otherwise unremarkable. Recommend clinical correlation and consideration of interventions to improve HDL if appropriate.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
